item.description:
### Added
- Automatic updates through Sparkle. Kivodo checks in the background, and a "Check for Updates…" menu bar item runs a check on demand. - A GitHub Actions release pipeline: pull requests get a build check; a push to main builds, signs with a Developer ID cert, notarizes, publishes a release, and updates the Sparkle appcast that installed copies read. - `scripts/build_app.sh` as one build path for local dev and CI. The `KIVODO_MAS` flag drops Sparkle for a future App Store build.
